title: 目標達成の後に・オグリン！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take Oguri Cap out for dinner as a reward for
her continual success in the G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Gulp. Hey, could I get another burger?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Didn't you say I could go ahead and fill my belly?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Actually, I'd best not. Instead...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll round things off with some salad. Do you mind
if I get ten corn salads?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to reward her for her repeated success in
the G1 races, I nod and try to forget about my
poor wallet.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Hey, look! Isn't that Ogurin?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, you're right! Oguriiin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Ogurin?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Whoa! She looked at us! She's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
We're big fans of yours, Ogurin! Good luck in
your next race!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: O-oh... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, Oguri Cap has been topping all the
popularity charts—even here in the city. I guess
that's what happens when you compete in enough
races.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... It makes me happy knowing people are in
my corner.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I hope I have their support in the next race as
well.
choice_data_list: That'll be the autumn Tenno Sho, right?
That'll be the autumn Tenno Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Tama's been waiting for this challenge, so I
need to keep upping my game.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...It's like a fire has lit inside my belly.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
After I'm done with these salads, I'm going to
order fifty large burgers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sparkling eyes are shining so bright right now,
it's almost blinding.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, what? You mean this place isn't all-you-can-eat?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm so sorry... I thought this was some sort of
buffet...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Hey! Are you okay?! Wake up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, celebrations for Oguri Cap's G1 race
wins come to an end.
